allow: Bash(gh repo view RohanPandeydev/horizonvfx-vercel-p2 --json isPrivate,visibility 2>/dev/null || echo "Could not check")

Bash(rm -f deploy.tar.gz && tar -czf deploy.tar.gz \\
  .next/standalone/ \\
  .next/static/ \\
  public/ \\
  app.js \\
  prisma/schema.prisma \\
  .env.production \\
  2>&1 && ls -lh deploy.tar.gz)
Bash(tar -czf deploy.tar.gz .next/standalone/ .next/static/ public/ app.js prisma/schema.prisma .env.production 2>&1 && ls -lh deploy.tar.gz)
Bash(which sshpass 2>/dev/null || brew list sshpass 2>/dev/null || echo "sshpass not installed")
Bash(cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && cp -r public .next/standalone/public && echo "Copied static and public dirs")
Bash(cp -r public .next/standalone/public && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && echo "Static files copied")
Bash(cp -r public .next/standalone/public && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && find .next/standalone -name "libquery_engine-darwin*" -delete 2>/dev/null && echo "Build ready")
Bash(cd /Users/rohankumarpandey/Finn/personal/horizonVFX/horizonvfx-vercel-p2 && tar -czf standalone-build.tar.gz -C .next standalone && ls -lh standalone-build.tar.gz)

Bash(expect -c '
set timeout 120
spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no rcimimhd@horizonvfx.in
expect "password:"
send "i9Z\\[A,EFu8kxzRd9\\r"
expect "$ "
send "cd ~/horizonvfx && ls -la app.js 2>/dev/null && echo EXISTING_APP || echo NO_EXISTING_APP\\r"
expect "$ "
send "echo DEPLOY_START && rm -rf ~/horizonvfx_backup 2>/dev/null; cp -r ~/horizonvfx ~/horizonvfx_backup 2>/dev/null; cd ~/horizonvfx && tar xzf ~/horizonvfx-deploy.tar.gz && echo EXTRACT_DONE\\r"
expect -timeout 60 "EXTRACT_DONE"
send "ls -la ~/horizonvfx/app.js ~/horizonvfx/.next/static/ ~/horizonvfx/server.js\\r"
expect "$ "
send "exit\\r"
expect eof
' 2>&1)

Bash(expect -c '
set timeout 60
spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no rcimimhd@horizonvfx.in
expect "password:"
send "i9Z\\[A,EFu8kxzRd9\\r"
expect "$ "
# Touch restart.txt for Passenger restart
send "mkdir -p ~/horizonvfx/tmp && touch ~/horizonvfx/tmp/restart.txt && echo PASSENGER_RESTART_DONE\\r"
expect "PASSENGER_RESTART_DONE"
expect "$ "
# Also try killing any existing node processes and check
send "pkill -u rcimimhd -f \\"node.*server.js\\" 2>/dev/null; pkill -u rcimimhd -f \\"node.*app.js\\" 2>/dev/null; echo KILLED_OLD\\r"
expect "KILLED_OLD"
expect "$ "
# Check node version
send "node -v && echo NODE_OK\\r"
expect "$ "
# Check the .htaccess or passenger config
send "cat ~/horizonvfx/.htaccess 2>/dev/null || echo NO_HTACCESS\\r"
expect "$ "
send "ls ~/public_html/.htaccess 2>/dev/null && cat ~/public_html/.htaccess 2>/dev/null || echo NO_PUBLIC_HTACCESS\\r"  
expect "$ "
# Check if there is a Phusion Passenger config
send "ls ~/nodevenv/ 2>/dev/null && echo NODEVENV_EXISTS || echo NO_NODEVENV\\r"
expect "$ "
send "exit\\r"
expect eof
' 2>&1)

Bash(expect -c '
set timeout 60
spawn ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no rcimimhd@horizonvfx.in
expect "password:"
send "i9Z\\[A,EFu8kxzRd9\\r"
expect "$ "
# Clean up macOS resource fork files
send "find ~/horizonvfx -name \\"._*\\" -delete 2>/dev/null && echo CLEANED_FORKS\\r"
expect "CLEANED_FORKS"
expect "$ "
# Verify static files
send "ls ~/horizonvfx/.next/static/ && echo STATIC_OK\\r"
expect "$ "
# Verify key files
send "ls -la ~/horizonvfx/.next/standalone/server.js ~/horizonvfx/app.js ~/horizonvfx/.env.production && echo FILES_OK\\r"
expect "$ "
# Touch restart again after cleanup
send "touch ~/horizonvfx/tmp/restart.txt && echo RESTART_TOUCHED\\r"
expect "RESTART_TOUCHED"
expect "$ "
# Remove the uploaded tar
send "rm -f ~/horizonvfx-deploy.tar.gz && echo TAR_REMOVED\\r"
expect "TAR_REMOVED"
expect "$ "
send "exit\\r"
expect eof
' 2>&1)

Bash(sshpass -p 'i9Z[A,EFu8kxzRd9' ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no rcimimhd@horizonvfx.in "
cd ~/horizonvfx

# Kill stale next-server processes
pkill -9 -f next-server 2>/dev/null && echo 'Killed stale processes' || echo 'No stale processes'

# Delete bundled .env with S3 credentials
rm -f .next/standalone/.env && echo 'Deleted .env from standalone'

# Verify .env.production has empty AWS vars
grep -c 'AWS_S3_BUCKET=' .env.production && echo '.env.production has AWS_S3_BUCKET line'

# Copy static files
cp -R .next/static/* .next/standalone/.next/static/ 2>/dev/null && echo 'Static files copied'

# Verify no .env in standalone
ls -la .next/standalone/.env* 2>/dev/null

echo 'Deploy complete - waiting for Passenger restart'
" 2>&1)
